preorder_price_source: Retailer preorder listings; EN WS was cheaper in 2019-2020 era
competitive_notes: BanG Dream has a dedicated WS competitive scene, particularly at locals. Poppin' Party builds had BCS representation in 2020-2022.
notes: One of the earlier EN WS releases. Preorder price reflects the lower EN pricing tier before the 2021-2022 price increases.
